papers.title: Role-Based Task Distribution in YAWL
papers.title_ja: YAWLにおけるロールベースのタスク分配
papers.summary: What happens when workflow tasks are assigned to an entire role rather than a specific user?This video introduces the role-based distribution pattern as a resource allocation mechanism in YAWL. The tutorial explains how role-based distribution makes a task available to all users who belong to a specified role, instead of assigning it to a single predefined individual. Using a simple workflow example involving store clerks and managers, the video demonstrates how a task is offered to multiple users simultaneously and remains visible in their work lists until one user accepts it. Once the task is taken, it is automatically removed from the work lists of the remaining users. The behavior is illustrated through both an animated explanation and a live execution in the YAWL system. Viewers learn how role-based distribution supports flexible task allocation in environments where multiple users are equally qualified to perform a task. The example highlights how this pattern balances flexibilit...
papers.summary_ja: ワークフロー管理システムYAWLにおいて、特定ユーザーではなく役割全体にタスクを割り当てるロールベースの分配パターンを紹介する。このパターンは資源配分メカニズムとして機能し、指定された役割に属するすべてのユーザーがタスクを利用可能にする。
papers.novelty_reason: ロールベースのタスク分配は既存のワークフロー管理システムにおいて確立された概念であり、既知の枠組み内の実装例である。

papers.title: 3D Printing of Soft Composites with Tunable Visco-Hyperelastic Properties
papers.title_ja: 調整可能な粘弾性特性を有する軟質複合材料の3Dプリンティング
papers.summary: The ability to precisely control spatially varying visco-hyperelastic properties of soft materials is an emerging need towards the development of biomimetic compliant structures. Multi-material additive manufacturing has shown promise as an effective method in achieving this goal, however commonly used methods are expensive and limited in material capabilities. This work firstly presents novel soft composites, consisting of a silicone matrix and thermoplastic elastomer reinforcements, fabricated through low-cost extrusion-based additive manufacturing. A customized 3D printer with direct ink write (DIW) and fused filament fabrication (FFF) capabilities is used to print composites with a sinusoidal reinforcement pattern in which hyperelastic properties are tuned and spatially varied through the frequency and amplitude of the reinforcement. papers.summary: Silicon carbide is a key wide-bandgap semiconductor material for next-generation power electronics, yet the Physical Vapor Transport (PVT) method used for bulk crystal growth remains constrained by complex thermal-chemical interactions and low growth rates. This study develops a data-driven framework to overcome these limitations by integrating a curated dataset of available experimental observations extracted from literature with machine learning (ML) models. The dataset includes seed temperature and equilibrium partial pressures of , and , with growth rate as the target. Feature scaling, normalization, and stratified sampling were applied to prepare training and test sets. Three modeling approaches—regularized linear regression, artificial neural networks, and k-nearest neighbors-were compared, with Gradient Boosting incorporated as a benchmark for advanced non-linear prediction. papers.title: Combating Data and Target Shifts in Visual Tasks
papers.title_ja: ビジュアルタスクにおけるデータおよびターゲットシフトへの対抗
papers.summary: The rapid advancement of deep learning models for visual tasks has led to significant progress in many domains. However, a key challenge remains: ensuring that models can generalize effectively to unseen samples or novel classes, especially in real-world scenarios where training data-target pairs are often limited or unavailable, and test data may exhibit shifts in both data and targets. This thesis addresses the problem of shifts across data and targets, proposing novel methods to improve model generalization and transferability in complex settings. The thesis identifies the different shift scenarios for visual tasks and presents their problem forms. The research first relaxes the static target distribution assumption in Multi-Domain Generalization (mDG) tasks, introducing the General Multi-Domain Generalization (GMDG) objective to improve generalization under varying data shifts. Specifically, Extensive experiments validate that GMDG is feasible for classification, segmentation, and ...
papers.summary_ja: 深層学習モデルの急速な進展にもかかわらず、未知のサンプルや新規クラスへの汎化、特に訓練データとターゲットの分布が異なる実世界のシナリオでの適応が重要な課題である。本研究はこのデータシフト問題に対する解決策を提案する。
papers.novelty_reason: ドメイン適応と分布シフトの問題は活発に研究される領域だが、視覚タスクへの新しい適用アプローチを提案している。

papers.title_ja: 次世代パワー変換の実現：窒化ガリウム双方向スイッチの設計、動的特性化、および応用
papers.summary: The global energy transition towards renewables and the proliferation of electrified transportation are driving an unprecedented demand for power conversion systems that achieve ultra-high power density, high reliability, and bidirectional power flow. Wide band gap (WBG) semiconductors, particularly Gallium Nitride (GaN), offer a pathway to this goal. Among them, the monolithic bidirectional switch (BiS) is recognized as a pivotal component capable of revolutionizing converter topologies by simplifying circuitry and minimizing parasitic elements. However, the development and adoption of GaN-based BiSs are critically hindered by a triad of intertwined challenges: a scarcity of mature and optimized device structures, a complete absence of standardized methodologies for characterizing their dynamic performance, and a lack of system-level topologies designed to exploit their unique advantages fully. papers.title: An investigation into the distribution of gains from merging
papers.title_ja: 企業合併による利益配分の調査
papers.summary: The thesis critically analyzes the economic and financial rationale for merging, both in order to gain some insight into why mergers might be profitable to shareholders, and in order to properly construct hypotheses and tests which might determine the profitability of merging to shareholders. A second purpose is to obtain evidence from monthly Stock Exchange share prices of abnormal gains and losses to shareholders in the U. K. Breweries and Distilleries industry companies as a result of mergers. The industry sample of seventy two mergers is also used to estimate the distribution of gains and losses between acquired and acquiring companies, and the gains from insider dealings by acquirers.
papers.summary_ja: 企業合併の経済的および財務的根拠を批判的に分析し、合併による株主利益の発生メカニズムを検討する。また合併の収益性を実証的に測定するための仮説構築と検定方法を構築している。
papers.novelty_reason: 企業合併分析は既知の経済学的研究領域であり、既存の理論枠組み内での応用分析である。

papers.summary: Policing is a stressful profession, and effective leadership is needed to mitigate the effects of organizational stressors that make it one of the most hazardous occupations in the world. Evidence suggests that transformational and transactional leadership can influence the health outcomes and commitment levels of officers, but much of the research and strategies are derived from large jurisdictions and have failed to account for smaller resource constrained contexts. Therefore, the viability of these strategies in smaller jurisdictions such as those in the Caribbean are understudied. Studies have tended to apply quantitative methodologies, which do not give officers a voice to fully capture their contextual experiences that ultimately shape their work related outcomes. To address this gap, more context specific research is needed which captures the voice of officers and investigates how leadership directly impacts organizational commitment and wellness in smaller jurisdictions. papers.novelty_reason: リーダーシップとウェルネスの関係は既知だが、警察という特殊な職業環境での実証研究として新しい応用領域を示している。

papers.summary: This study is informed by twenty-five years of clinical experience in the fields of eating disorders and addiction, drawing upon observations from both private practice and supervision of rehabilitation facilities. It responds to emerging evidence indicating that rates of eating disorders in males are rising more rapidly than in females, with no significant difference in the clinical severity of symptoms between sexes. Despite these trends, treatment approaches specifically tailored for men remain under-explored, particularly within the field of Analytical Psychology. To address this deficit, this research shifts the traditional analytical focus from the mother to the father-son relationship to better understand the development of eating disorders in men. The study introduces a new conceptual framework, the "Male Eating Disorder Matrix," which operationalizes four primary clinical positions: Shame, Identification and blueprint for development, Father figure, and Power struggle. Additio...
papers.summary_ja: 摂食障害と依存症の臨床経験25年をもとに、父子関係が男性の摂食障害や身体イメージにどのように影響するかをユング心理学的観点から分析した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: 摂食障害研究は既知だが、父子関係というジェンダー固有の視点とユング理論の結合は臨床心理学における比較的新しい着眼点である。

papers.title: Transformational space: group psychotherapy with young people experiencing gender-related distress
papers.title_ja: 変容的空間：ジェンダーに関連した苦痛を経験する若年者を対象とした集団精神療法
papers.summary: This qualitative research explores what group psychotherapy can offer adolescents experiencing gender-related distress (GRD). An exponential increase in young people seeking help for GRD over the last 15 years, amid legal challenge and public dispute about the ethics and efficacy of associated medical intervention, has focussed attention on what psychological therapies can contribute to an appropriate response. The Cass Review - commissioned to make recommendations on NHS care for this population - stated that ‘a much better understanding is needed’ about the increasing numbers presenting for help, ‘their support needs, and the full range of potential treatment options’ (Cass 2022, p.39). While the diverse and often complex antecedents and manifestations of adolescent GRD indicate no one model will fit all, this study aims to better understand what group psychotherapy can offer this cohort as one such option. It examines a provision informed by psychoanalytic, group analytic, mentaliza...
papers.summary_ja: 性別に関連した苦痛（GRD）を経験する思春期の若年者に対して、集団精神療法がどのような治療効果をもたらすかを探索的に調査した質的研究である。過去15年間でGRDを求める若年者が急増している状況に対応している。
papers.novelty_reason: ジェンダー関連の苦痛に対する集団精神療法アプローチは、急速に増加する若年層の課題に対する新しい臨床的対応として分野に新たな方向性を示している。

papers.title: Depth of Processing, learner aptitude, and the acquisition of L2 English grammatical structures
papers.title_ja: 処理の深さ、学習者適性、および第2言語英文法構造の習得
papers.summary: Depth of Processing (DoP) is central to several models of instructed second language acquisition (ISLA) (Leow, 2015). While DoP has been extensively examined in vocabulary learning (e.g., Laufer & Hulstijn, 2001), its role in the acquisition of grammatical structures, particularly through oral and audio-visual modalities remains comparatively underexplored. Drawing on the Levels of Processing framework (Craik & Lockhart, 1972), this study investigated whether task-induced processing depth influences the acquisition of third conditionals and comparatives, and whether language aptitude (LLAMA B, D, F) predicts learning gains. Using a pretest–posttest design, four intact classes involving 108 Grade 8 EFL learners in India were assigned to one of the three experimental conditions differing in level and type of processing: Low DoP, High DoP Explicit, and High DoP Implicit. The treatment task required the participants to listen to an audio-visual story containing the target structure...
papers.summary_ja: 指導された第2言語習得（ISLA）における処理の深さ（DoP）が、特に口頭を通じた英文法構造習得にどのような役割を果たすかを調査した研究である。語彙学習での検証は進んでいるが、文法習得への応用は相対的に未開拓である。
papers.novelty_reason: 処理の深さという理論は既知だが、文法習得、特に口頭での習得メカニズムへの適用は言語学習研究における比較的新しい領域である。

papers.title: China’s Pandemic Biopolitics: Handling HIV/AIDS and COVID-19
papers.title_ja: 中国のパンデミック・バイオポリティクス：HIV/AIDSおよびCOVID-19への対応
papers.summary: This thesis critically examines China's approach to managing the HIV/AIDS and COVID-19 pandemics, contrasting the government’s intention of control with the lived experience of these infections. It is based on a mixed-method design where I have collected and analysed secondary materials (media narratives and published policy/governmental documents), interviews with individuals, and online/offline ethnographies. Drawing on Michel Foucault’s concept of biopolitics, I examine how the Chinese government’s responses to the pandemics enhanced its control of the population by attempting to manipulate and steer the processes of knowledge production. I critically employ this Foucauldian approach, considering China's unique political landscape, marked by a mix of one-party authoritarianism conjoined with neoliberalism and discuss the significance and challenges of using this theoretical framework in a context different to those of neoliberal modes of governance. The thesis begins with a focus on...
papers.summary_ja: 中国政府のHIV/AIDS および COVID-19パンデミック対応を、統制の意図と実際の感染経験の対比を通じて批判的に検証した研究である。メディア資料やインタビューデータを含む混合方法論を採用している。
papers.novelty_reason: バイオポリティクス理論とパンデミム管理の結合により、中国の公衆衛生政策の権力構造と人的経験の不一致を新たな文脈で提示している。

papers.title: The nature and tensions of environmental management control in local authorities
papers.title_ja: 地方自治体における環境マネジメント統制の性質と緊張関係
papers.authors: Christophe Maurel, Christophe Favoreu, London Proofreaders
papers.summary: This exploratory research aims to characterize, on the one hand, the concept of environmental management control (EMC) through the practices that underpin it, and, on the other hand, the tensions associated with it and the implementation of these practices in public organizations. Although EMC is attracting growing interest within the public sector, it seems to be facing technical and governance difficulties. A grid for analyzing management tools and the theory of organizational paradoxes is used to address the issue of characterizing EMC practices and the associated tensions in the local public sector. Various municipalities were mobilized to explore and characterize their first experiences of implementing EMC. Our results enable us to characterize both the tools used and the tensions generated between the objectives pursued in terms of resource management, dialogue with the socio-economic environment, and behavioral orientation.
papers.summary_ja: 環境マネジメント統制（EMC）の概念を、公共組織における実践を通じて特性化し、その実装に伴う緊張関係を探索的に分析した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: 公共セクターの環境管理は既知だが、マネジメント統制という経営学的レンズで地方自治体の実践を分析する点は公共管理研究における新しい応用である。

papers.title: Management of healthcare risk waste and non-hazardous healthcare waste: the case of a public hospital in western France
papers.title_ja: 医療廃棄物と非危険医療廃棄物の管理：フランス西部の公立病院の事例
papers.authors: Meriam Karaa, Hanane El Bahraoui, Sarah Garidi, Sébastien de Villèle
papers.summary: This article explores the management of hospital waste, specifically healthcare risk waste (HCRW) and non-hazardous healthcare waste (NHCW). Our study focuses on a hospital in western France, considered as a reference facility, and underlines the specific issues it faces. The methodological approach taken is based on a qualitative case study, providing a thorough understanding of waste management, risk analysis and traceability processes. Data were collected via interviews, direct observations and a test audit to assess regulatory compliance. The goal of this research is to analyse current practices and to provide recommendations for HCRW and NHCW management and traceability.
papers.summary_ja: フランス西部の参照病院を事例として、医療リスク廃棄物（HCRW）および非危険医療廃棄物（NHCW）の管理における特有の課題と実践を分析した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: 病院廃棄物管理は既知だが、特定の施設における廃棄物分類と管理プロセスの詳細な記述は地域的・実践的な価値を持つ。

papers.title: The Role of Social Media Influencers in Promoting Therapeutic Compliance: Implications for Public Health Policy
papers.title_ja: 治療コンプライアンス促進におけるソーシャルメディアインフルエンサーの役割：公衆衛生政策への示唆
papers.authors: Léna Griset, Loick Menvielle, Rupanwita Dash
papers.summary: Treatment adherence (hereafter, adherence) is critical to achieving positive therapeutic outcomes, whereas non-adherence remains a major public health challenge that hinders recovery and increases healthcare expenditures. As social media has become a prominent channel for information consumption and sharing, social media influencers (SMIs) may play an important role in enhancing adherence. Yet the mechanisms through which engagement with SMIs promotes adherence are not well understood. Drawing on the source attractiveness model, this study posits that influencer characteristics – specifically social attractiveness and perceived credibility – shape evaluations of health messages and, in turn, persuade followers toward adherence. We examine the relationship between SMI social attractiveness and adherence, test the mediating roles of perceived authenticity and perceived expertise, and explore the moderating role of SMI message type. Using survey data from 475 participants, we find that SM...
papers.summary_ja: ソーシャルメディアインフルエンサーが治療アドヒアランス（医療遵守）の向上に果たす役割を調査し、公衆衛生政策への含意を導出した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: ソーシャルメディア時代における新しい健康コミュニケーション手段として、インフルエンサーマーケティングの医療分野への応用は比較的新しい研究領域である。

papers.title: A semi-autonomous public organization’s legitimation work: the case of the survival of an actor in the disability field
papers.title_ja: 準自律的公共組織の正当化活動：障害分野における一アクターの生存事例
papers.authors: Alexandre Salvatori, Sarah Richard, François Grima
papers.summary: This qualitative study, based on semi-structured interviews and ethnography, starts from the observation that little research has been done on maintaining the legitimacy of semi-autonomous public organizations in a context constrained by certain principles of New Public Management. These principles question the legitimacy of public organizations as the most relevant actors for meeting user expectations. In this article, we study the case of GHP, a semi-autonomous public organization of the “agency” type based in France, which manages a public fund. Based on neo-institutional theory, the study seeks to understand the involvement of actors in the dynamics of maintaining the internal and external legitimacy that ensures the sustainability of an organization. We show that maintaining legitimacy and its alignment between internal and external sources is achieved in a process involving four stages: challenges, maintenance, diffusion, and consensus. Institutional entrepreneurs within the orga...
papers.summary_ja: 新公共管理（NPM）原則によって制約された状況下で、準自律的公共組織が正当性を維持するメカニズムを、半構造化インタビューと民族誌調査に基づいて分析した質的研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: NPMと正当性の関係は既知だが、準自律的組織の正当化活動を民族誌的に記述する点は公共組織研究における詳細な文脈化を示している。

papers.title: Towards a transformative and territorial leadership: The case of organic farming development in Occitanie
papers.title_ja: 変容的かつ領土的リーダーシップへ向かって：オクシタニー地域における有機農業開発の事例
papers.authors: Pierre Triboulet, Charlène Arnaud, Liz Carey-Libbrecht
papers.summary: The aim of this article is to characterize the modalities of transformative leadership in support of local public action. It posits that this transformation is based on both the democratic and the distributed dimensions of leadership, and that it is concretely manifested in the territory concerned. To operationalize the concept of Territorial Transformative Leadership (TTL), it draws on a case study of a French Region, Occitanie, which is leading the political project to transform production methods from conventional to organic farming (OF). Twenty semi-structured interviews were conducted in Occitanie. Our results show the analytical potential of the concept of TTL, which reveals (dis)equilibria between the two dimensions of TTL, and questions both the ecosystem of actors driving public action, and the interdependencies between ecosystem and territory.
papers.summary_ja: 地方公共政策を支援する変容的リーダーシップの様式を特性化した研究であり、このリーダーシップが民主主義的かつ分散的な次元に基づき、当該領土に具体的に現れることを論じている。
papers.novelty_reason: 領土的文脈における民主的・分散的リーダーシップと有機農業開発の結合は、地域公共政策研究に新たな理論的フレームワークをもたらしている。

papers.title: The Role of Collective Bricolage in Creating University Governance Structures: The Example of the Galileo Observatory
papers.title_ja: 大学ガバナンス構造の創造における集団ブリコラージュの役割：ガリレオ天文台の事例
papers.summary: This study investigates the concept of “collective bricolage” within the framework of creating a universe science observatory in France. In the face of significant transformations in higher education and research, this article examines how university stakeholders can employ collective bricolage to adapt to institutional mandates for restructuring. Drawing on Lévi-Strauss’s notion of bricolage and the theoretical contributions of Duymedjian and Rüling (2010), this research investigates how this bricolage can be implemented in the absence of conventional or normative space to support the process, and particularly within a context characterized by conflictual relationships. The case study analyzes the collective bricolage process and its components, demonstrating that the dialectical nature of collective bricolage facilitates the creation of robust governance structures through the negotiation and recombination of resources and rationales from the diverse actors involved.
papers.summary_ja: フランスの天体科学観測所設立の枠組みで、高等教育研究の大規模な変容に直面する大学ステークホルダーが、「集団ブリコラージュ」という概念を通じてどのように対応するかを検証した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: 集団ブリコラージュを高等教育ガバナンスに適用することで、制度的変動への非計画的・創意的対応メカニズムを新たな文脈で提示している。

papers.title: Is the university an enabling environment? A qualitative study examining the impact of university disability policy for staff
papers.title_ja: 大学は有効な環境か？：職員を対象とした大学障害政策の影響に関する質的研究
papers.summary: This study aims to address the university social responsibility (USR) in France by examining disability policy for staff. The concept of an enabling environment is utilized, grounded in the capabilities approach. The aim is to understand how a French university fosters an enabling environment, on the one hand, to facilitate the disclosure of disability and, on the other hand, to promote participation in the institution’s disability policy. The present study employs a qualitative methodology, encompassing both primary and secondary data collection. A thematic content analysis is then conducted, utilising QDA Miner software. The results demonstrate the processes ranging from mobilizable resources to achievements. Some positive conversion factors are highlighted (e.g., the visibility of disability ambassadors), but also some negative ones (e.g., lack of time). It is evident that capabilities are observed, thereby strengthening the power of staff to take steps towards recognition as a disa...
papers.summary_ja: フランスの大学における職員障害政策を、ケイパビリティ・アプローチに基づいた有効な環境（enabling environment）の概念を用いて分析し、大学社会責任（USR）を検証した研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: ケイパビリティ・アプローチの高等教育への適用は新しい領域だが、職員障害政策という限定的なスコープでの応用である。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap in Reading Skills: The Role of Home Literacy Environment and Parental Expectations in Chinese Rural-to- Urban Migrant Children
papers.title_ja: 読み能力格差を埋める：中国の農村から都市への移住児童における家庭識字環境と親の期待の役割
papers.summary: Background Research on the Home Literacy Environment (HLE) in China has predominantly centreed on disparities between urban residents (UR) and rural-to-urban migrants (RUM), yielding substantial insights while leaving critical gaps unaddressed. Although existing literature has identified socioeconomic status (SES) as a key determinant of HLE disparities, it has frequently overlooked pivotal factors such as the duration of urban residency and parental expectations (PE) regarding children’s reading proficiency. These variables are integral to developing a holistic understanding of HLE dynamics within RUM families. Furthermore, while the adverse effects of such disparities on low-level reading skills (LLRS) among migrant children are well-established, potential variations in high-level reading skills (HLRS) remain underexamined. Reading constitutes a multifaceted cognitive process involving textual meaning construction. Grounded in theoretical frameworks such as the he triangle model and ...
papers.summary_ja: 中国における家庭識字環境（HLE）研究が都市住民（UR）と農村から都市への移住者（RUM）間の格差に集中してきた中で、未解決の重要な課題に対応する研究であり、社会経済的要因がどのように読み能力格差に寄与するかを検証している。
papers.novelty_reason: 識字環境研究は既知だが、中国の急速な都市化による移住児童という特定の人口層に焦点を当てることで、発展途上国の教育格差研究に新たな重要性をもたらしている。

papers.title: The Representation of the Anthropocene in Contemporary Chinese Science Fiction
papers.title_ja: 現代中国SF文学における人新世の表象
papers.summary: [The Representation of the Anthropocene in Contemporary Chinese Science Fiction]
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、現代中国のSF作品における人新世という概念の表象方法を分析する。中国文学が人為的に引き起こされた地球環境変化の物語化をいかに行っているかを検討し、SF というジャンルが環境危機の文化的意味付けに果たす役割を明らかにする。
papers.novelty_reason: 人新世の文学的表象という比較的新しい課題を、中国SF という特定の地域・ジャンルに限定して深掘りし、環境文学批評に新たな地理的視点をもたらしている。

papers.title: An Analysis of Filial Relations in the Teachings of Jesus and Muhammad from the Perspective of Comparative Ethics and Scriptural Reasoning
papers.title_ja: 比較倫理学と聖典解釈学の観点からみたイエスとムハンマドの教えにおける親孝行関係の分析
papers.summary: This thesis offers a comparative-ethical analysis of textual tensions in the teachings of Jesus and Muhammad about filial relations as well as their reception in contemporary Christian-Muslim relations. While the issue of textual tension has been widely used, and abused, in the context of religious polemics, it is virtually ignored in the practice of interreligious dialogue. One reason for the absence of effective Christian-Muslim dialogue on textual tension is the absence of a clear hermeneutical approach that facilitates and promotes mutual understanding between the two religious traditions. The problem of textual tension can be addressed if the strengths of, and opportunities presented by, interreligious dialogue and comparative ethics are brought together. Interreligious dialogue, on the one hand, has the clear purpose of promoting mutual understanding but it lacks a clear approach to the practice of dialogue. The academic study of comparative ethics, on the other hand, offers well...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、イエスとムハンマドの教えにおける親孝行関係について比較倫理学的に分析し、聖典テキストの緊張関係を検討する。現代のキリスト教-イスラム教関係における宗教間対話への含意を示唆する。
papers.novelty_reason: 比較宗教倫理学の既存枠組みを用いながらも、聖典解釈学という方法を組み合わせることで、相互宗教理解に新しい視点を付与している。

papers.title: Le cinéma soviétique de la mort de Staline à la Perestroïka en dialogue avec le reste du monde : analyse des transferts culturels à l’oeuvre
papers.title_ja: スターリン死後からペレストロイカへ：ソビエト映画と世界の対話—文化的転移分析
papers.summary: Soviet cinema has always been a central tool for propaganda and the construction of socialism, as Vladimir Lenin emphasized when he called it ''the most important of the arts.'' In the decades following the October Revolution of 1917, this cinema glorified the ideals of the Communist Party, fulfilling the demands of socialist realism and serving the goals of the state. The Stalinist years reinforced this role, imposing strict censorship and artistic homogenization. However, Stalin's death in 1953 marked the beginning of a cultural transformation, notably driven by the Khrushchevite Thaw. This thesis explores the dynamics of Soviet cinema between Stalin's death and perestroika, highlighting the interaction between Soviet cinema and international influences. The Thaw allowed for greater thematic and stylistic freedom, fostering an artistic dialogue with the West. The influence of the French New Wave is particularly notable, with Soviet directors drawing inspiration from its innovative te...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文はスターリン時代からペレストロイカ期におけるソビエト映画の変容を、国際的な文化的転移という観点から分析する。レーニンが強調した映画というプロパガンダ手段が、冷戦期にいかに共産主義イデオロギーの表現から転換していったかを検討する。
papers.novelty_reason: ソビエト映画史を従来の政治史的分析から脱却させ、文化的転移という国際的相互作用の観点から再構成し、映画研究に新たな分析枠組みをもたらしている。

papers.title: AI and the Gothic
papers.title_ja: AIとゴシック文学
papers.summary: For as long as technology has existed, there have been those who are afraid of its implications and wish to roll back its progress. One way in which this has traditionally been effected is through the use of gothic tropes to render new technologies as frightful or vampiric upon either labour or life. In this chapter, I explore the ways that gothic aspects are applied to the new breed of large language models, broadly dubbed AI. Taking a base history of artificial life and its intersection with gothic literatures, such as Frankenstein, but also more contemporary touchstones, this chapter aims to understand how gothic rhetorics influence societal uptake and acceptance or rejection of new technological inventions. This chapter will naturally also explore the unnaturalness of supposedly "playing God" and creating artificial life, a trope very much rooted in gothic traditions.
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、新しい技術に対する恐怖と抵抗が伝統的にゴシック的な修辞を通じて表現されてきたプロセスを検討する。AIという最新技術が、労働と生命に対する吸血鬼的な脅威としていかに表現されているかを分析する。
papers.novelty_reason: デジタル時代における古典的文学ジャンル（ゴシック）の再生的活用を検討し、テクノロジー論と文学批評を統合した新しい分析視角を提示している。

papers.title: Scaling the Cosmos in the Modern Era: Images, Tools, and Instruments
papers.title_ja: 近現代における宇宙のスケーリング：イメージ、道具、計測器
papers.summary: Il convegno Scaling the Cosmos in the Modern Era: Images, Tools, and Instruments ruota attorno al concetto di scaling inteso come riferimento critico e metodologico che va oltre la semplice misurazione, ma attraversa dimensioni spaziali, temporali e cognitive, trasformando il modo in cui comprendiamo, rappresentiamo e percepiamo l’universo. Il convegno esaminerà i diversi modi in cui immagini, strumenti e dispositivi sono stati utilizzati per misurare il cosmo. Dai primi orologi astronomici e globi celesti alle moderne simulazioni digitali, ogni tipo di misurazione rivela sia le possibilità che i limiti dei nostri tentativi di comprendere l’universo.Avvalendosi delle metodologie delle scienze umane e delle scienze naturali, il convegno intende ridefinire il concetto stesso di scaling. Questo approccio interdisciplinare evidenzia l’evoluzione delle pratiche e permette di comprendere l’universo non solo come realtà fisica, ma come una complessa struttura culturale, epistemica e storica.I...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、スケーリングという概念を単なる測定を超えた、空間的・時間的・認識的次元を横断する批評的・方法論的参照枠として捉える。近現代において人類が宇宙を理解する方法の変化を検討する。
papers.novelty_reason: スケーリングという概念の多次元的な再構成を通じて、科学史・技術史・認識論の統合的分析を試みており、既存枠組みに新しい批評的層を加えている。

papers.title: Human Remains: Everest and the Ontological Afterlives of George Mallory and Andrew Irvine
papers.title_ja: 人間の遺骨：エベレストとジョージ・マロリーおよびアンドリュー・アーヴィンの存在論的遺産
papers.summary: The philosopher Giorgio Agamben has argued that the ‘human/nonhuman distinction is the conceptual ground for any further ontological elaboration’, (Grieve-Carlson, 179) that humans must distinguish themselves from their environment and other beings before the work of culture can begin. However, objects frequently ‘problematize the boundaries of the human’ (Knutson, 273), never more so than when we encounter human remains in the process of transition from human subject to physical object. The philosopher Daniel Heller-Roazen notes ‘that a corpse is no human being seems obvious, yet it is equally certain that it is no ordinary thing…A human cadaver is neither a person nor not a person. It is a nonperson in a special sense, which requires commentary and elucidation’ (Heller-Roazen,159). On Everest, the ambiguity of post-mortal personhood is exacerbated by the preservation of human remains in liminal states in the mountain cryosphere. Human remains on Everest enter new ontic states and new...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文はアガンベンの人間/非人間の区別に関する議論を出発点として、エベレスト上の遺骨という客体が示唆する存在論的問題を検討する。死後の人間性の変容と自然環境との関係を再考する。
papers.novelty_reason: 人文地理学における死体論と存在論的問題を融合させ、非人間的自然の中における人間の存在論的位置を問い直す新しい分析地平を開拓しており、パラダイムシフトの可能性を有している。

papers.title: Labour mobility in Europe: Using Planned Behaviour Theory to understand migration intentions and location choice of the highly skilled
papers.title_ja: ヨーロッパにおける労働移動性：計画行動理論を用いた高度人材の移動意思と立地選択の理解
papers.summary: Highly skilled migration is a complex phenomenon which despite its comparatively small volume continues to receive interest from a variety of disciplines, all seeking to understand what drives individuals to migrate, and where to. Migration in general has historically been assessed through an economic lens, assuming financial incentives as the key motivation, and treating the migrant as a rational actor who carefully considers their options before making a rational decision about location and time of migration. This approach, however, proves unsatisfactory because it fails to consider non-financial drivers, the individual’s social environment, and the presence of perceived challenges which all influence the decision-making process. This study applies an expanded Planned Behaviour Theory model to understand how highly skilled young Europeans form their intention to migrate, which locations they choose, and what factors influence their decision-making process before migration takes place...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は高度人材の国際移動を計画行動理論の枠組みで分析し、従来の経済学的アプローチの限界を超える。個人の移動意思形成と立地選択の複合的なメカニズムを検討する。
papers.novelty_reason: 心理学的理論を移動研究に応用する試みであり、従来の経済学的分析に補足的視点を加えるが、理論的革新性は限定的である。

papers.title: Predictions at war: an inferential approach to decision-making in international politics
papers.title_ja: 戦争における予測：国際政治における意思決定への推論的接近
papers.summary: This thesis introduces the inferential actor model to International Relations to address the persistent puzzle of why leaders make sub-optimal foreign policy choices. Drawing on the neuroscience theory of active inference, it reframes decision-making as a dynamic process in which uncertainty is not simply a problem of missing information but an actor-managed variable with direct implications for the decision process. The model’s validity is tested through an extended case study of Lyndon Johnson’s Vietnam strategy (1964-65), comparing its expectations with those of two stylized alternatives: a realist model rooted in rationalist assumptions and a domestic politics model. Based on extensive archival research, the thesis finds that gradual escalation was less the product of firm conviction than a costly exercise in hypothesis testing. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は神経科学の能動的推論理論を国際関係論に適用し、指導者がなぜ最適でない外交政策選択を行うのかという長年の謎に取り組む。不確実性下での意思決定プロセスを動的に再構成する。
papers.novelty_reason: 神経科学の理論を国際政治分析に統合することで、従来の合理的行為者仮説を越えた意思決定モデルを導入し、国際関係論に新しい学際的方向性をもたらしている。

papers.title: L’Un, l’être, les principes chez Damascius: Lecture du Traité des premiers principes
papers.title_ja: ダマスキウスにおける一者、存在、諸原理：『第一原理に関する問題と解決』の読解
papers.summary: This book addresses the metaphysical question of the first principles as articulated by Damascius (458/462-538) in his Problems and Solutions Concerning the First Principles (De Principiis). Damascius’ treatise is a major philosophical work of Antiquity, offering a radical and profound enquiry into principles. The present book stresses the philosophical and historical relevance of Damascius’ work with regard to this metaphysical issue and provides a detailed analysis of the De Principiis. This study is based on the hypothesis that the aporetic opening of Damascius’ treatise and his treatment of the concept of an absolute and completely ineffable principle are the first step toward an enquiry about the first principles which can be called “principles,” namely the One and its threefold manifestation as One-All, All-One, and One-Being. Recent studies have stressed Damascius’ aporetic method and the radical nature of his view regarding the concept of an absolute principle. However, little ...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文はダマスキウス（458/462-538）による『第一原理に関する問題と解決』における第一原理の形而上学的問いを検討する。古代哲学における根本的で深い真理探究を提示する著作を詳細に分析する。
papers.novelty_reason: 古代新プラトン主義の重要な哲学者の詳細な文献学的解釈であるが、既存の古代哲学研究の基本的枠組み内での解釈作業である。

papers.title: Learning-driven prospect and household risk mitigation strategy under uncertain climate risks: a dynamic cumulative prospect theory approach
papers.title_ja: 不確実な気候リスク下での学習駆動的見通しと世帯のリスク緩和戦略：動的累積見通し理論アプローチ

papers.summary: How do households perceive and value the growing risks of climate change (such as floods, fires, and windstorms) in their willingness to pay a certain housing insurance premium? Does (the speed of) learning about the (in)frequency of climate-related risks shape households’ decisions to endogenize it in their future premium decisions? In this paper, we introduce the role of learning in the characterisation of a prospect function of a household. Because households invariably make decisions under uncertainty, how certain risks (such as the probability of climate-related risks) develop over time, a class of households may see their urgencies differently from others. Through a learning-based approach, we formalize an agent-based decision, particularly a cumulative prospect in a dynamic setting. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は気候変動リスク（洪水、火災、暴風雨等）に対する世帯の認識と評価が、住宅保険加入意思にいかに影響するかを検討する。気候リスクに関する学習速度が世帯の経済的意思決定に及ぼす影響を分析する。
papers.novelty_reason: 行動経済学の累積見通し理論を気候リスク適応行動に適用し、従来の効用最大化モデルを超えた家計の意思決定メカニズムを解明している。

The introductory section has been reorganized to articulate the causal chain linking fossil-fuel industrialization, the doctrine of perpetual economic growth, and the resulting destabilization of planetary systems. A new opening section reconstructs the historical escape from classical Malthusian limits through fossil energy, analyzes the expansion of global population and consumption under industrial civilization, and explains how these processes produced a condition of planetary-scale ecological overshoot. Rather than presen...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は版を重ねながら概念的統合と構造的精緻化を行い、人口成長と地球システムの制約を統合した分析枠組みを展開する。気候変動と資源枯渇が人口動態に及ぼす相互作用を検討する。

papers.title: Three Essays on Applied Econometrics
papers.title_ja: 応用計量経済学の三論文：中国における制度変化と政策転換が経済成果と社会衡平性に及ぼす影響
papers.summary: This dissertation consists of three chapters, unified by a central inquiry into how institutional changes and policy shifts shape economic outcomes and social equity in China. Each chapter examines a distinct policy transformation—family planning, labor market reform, and trade liberalization—through the lens of inequality, mobility, and power. While the contexts differ, the overarching theme is clear: the distributional consequences of economic policies are profoundly mediated by social norms, political incentives, and pre-existing structures of advantage.

papers.title: The seminal proteome of a monandrous fly, Drosophila subobscura
papers.title_ja: 一夫一婦制ショウジョウバエ（Drosophila subobscura）の精液タンパク質体
papers.summary: When females mate with multiple males, ejaculates from different partners compete within the female reproductive tract. Males gain a competitive advantage by transferring seminal fluid proteins (Sfps) that manipulate female post-mating responses, such as reducing female propensity to remate. But in monandrous species, where females typically mate only once, post-mating sexual selection is absent, raising key questions about the complexity and identity of Sfps in monandrous seminal proteomes. To address this, we characterised the seminal proteome of the monandrous fly Drosophila subobscura. Using long-read RNA-seq, we created improved gene models for the D. subobscura accessory gland and ejaculatory duct, then, using a label-free quantitative proteomics approach, we identified 172 Sfps. This number is comparable to the 153 Sfps previously reported in polyandrous D. melanogaster using a similar approach. The D. subobscura seminal proteome contains all the D. melanogaster sex peptide netw...
papers.summary_ja: 複数オスとの交配時に精液中のタンパク質がメス生殖器内で競争することを研究している。オスは精液タンパク質を転送することで交配後のメスの再交配行動を抑制するなどの競争上の利点を得る。
papers.novelty_reason: 精液タンパク質の機能は既知だが、一夫一婦制種における精子競争メカニズムの詳細な解析は新視点を提供する。

papers.title: A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases
papers.title_ja: 全身疾患シグネチャーを明らかにする全血液転写体アトラスの構築
papers.summary: This dataset accompanies the manuscript titled “A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases” Whole-blood transcriptomics (WBT) provides critical insights into systemic health and disease. In this study, we established a large-scale WBT Atlas comprising 4,444 samples across 98 distinct health conditions. Through integrative analyses, we identified disease-specific gene expression signatures and developed a multi-omics classification framework capable of distinguishing among these conditions based on their unique transcriptomic profiles. The dataset includes RNA-seq data from 4,444 samples used for atlas construction, along with 10 cohorts utilized for machine learning–based external validation.
papers.summary_ja: 全血液転写体解析により全身的な健康と疾患に関する重要な知見を提供する大規模アトラスを構築した。複数疾患にわたるシステミックシグネチャーの同定が可能になる。
papers.novelty_reason: パンディジーズアプローチによる統合的な全血液転写体アトラスは、従来の単一疾患研究の枠を超えた新たな比較研究基盤を提供する。

papers.summary: The mechanisms underlying the formation of species diversity have remained a subject of intense debate. In this study, we used Gryllidea (crickets) as a representative lineage and employed a phylogenetic comparative framework based on a robust phylogeny reconstructed from ultraconserved elements, mitochondrial genomes, nuclear ribosomal genes, DNA barcodes, and morphological traits. Our spatiotemporal evolutionary analyses indicate Gryllidea originated in the Early Jurassic, diverging into Grylloidea and Gryllotalpoidea, with marked increases in diversification rates at the ancestral node of Grylloidea and within Trigonidiinae and Goniogryllus of Gryllinae. Most species within these rapidly diversifying clades are distributed in the Oriental and Sino-Japanese regions. Integrating biotic (genomic and morphological) and abiotic (climatic and geographic) factors, we reveal that cricket diversification results from synergistic interactions of multiple factors, with biotic factors exerting ...
papers.summary_ja: 超保存配列に基づいた堅牢な系統樹を用いた比較系統解析によってコオロギの種多様性形成メカニズムを解明する。種多様性形成の基本的なメカニズムについての議論に貢献する。
papers.novelty_reason: 超保存配列を用いた系統解析方法は新しいが、種多様性形成の基本的な考察枠組みは既知である。

papers.summary: Background: The underrepresentation of Hmong-Mien (HM) people in Asian genomic studies has hindered our comprehensive understanding of the full landscape of their evolutionary history and complex trait architecture. South China is a multi-ethnic region and indigenously settled by ethnolinguistically diverse HM, Austroasiatic (AA), Tai-Kadai (TK), Austronesian (AN) and Sino-Tibetan (ST) people, which is regarded as East Asia's initial cradle of biodiversity. However, previous fragmented genetic studies have only presented a fraction of the landscape of genetic diversity in this region, especially the lack of haplotype-based genomic resources. The deep characterization of demographic history and natural-selection-relevant genetic architecture of HM people was necessary. Results: We reported one HM-specific genomic resource and comprehensively explored the fine-scale genetic structure and adaptative features inferred from the genome-wide SNP data of 440 HM individuals from 33 ethnolinguis...

papers.title: Dynamic Mitochondrial Protein Succinylation Induced by Nutritional Intervention with Omega-3 Polyunsaturated Fatty Acids Elicits Growth Inhibition and Lethality in Prostate Cancer Cells

papers.summary: Prostate cancer (PCa) continues to present a significant therapeutic challenge due to its metabolic plasticity and resistance to conventional treatments. Although omega-3 fatty acids, especially high-purity eicosapentaenoic acid (EPA), have demonstrated anticancer properties, the underlying molecular mechanisms remain inadequately understood. In this study, we provide evidence that EPA induces potent growth inhibition in PCa cells by modulating a mitochondrial succinylation network, thereby revealing three interconnected nodes of metabolic vulnerability. Through succinylomic profiling and functional validation, we identified SDHA, GOT2, and DAP3 as critical EPA-induced succinylation targets. Mechanistically, SDHA succinylation induces succinate accumulation and promotes widespread succinylation across mitochondrial proteins, thereby disrupting the homeostasis of mitochondria. This mitochondrial dysfunction converges on two lethal pathways in PCa cells: first, GOT2 hyper-succinylation i...
papers.summary_ja: 前立腺がんの代謝可塑性と薬剤耐性に対して、高純度EPA（イコサペンタエン酸）による分子メカニズムを解明する。ミトコンドリアのスクシニル化修飾を新たなターゲットとして提案する。

papers.summary: The Hippo pathway is evolutionarily conserved to regulate multiple biological processes including development, organ size, apoptosis, and tissue regeneration, thereby maintaining tissue homeostasis. This tumour-suppressive signalling cascade acts inactivates the downstream effectors and oncogenes YAP/TAZ, preventing their binding to the TEAD transcription factors. Disruption of the Hippo pathway and aberrant YAP/TAZ activity are observed in many cancers such as pleural mesothelioma (PM) and head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC), where there are known genetic drivers. Deubiquitinating enzymes (DUBs) have been identified as direct or indirect regulators of the pathway. However, questions remain unresolved, notably around the specificity of their interaction with the Hippo components which may depend on the cancer type and/or genetic background. To uncover novel roles for DUBs in malignancies with YAP/TAZ aberrant activation, the regulation of these oncogenes in PM and HNSCC was i...
papers.summary_ja: Hippo経路下流のYAP/TAZのユビキチン化制御が発展・器官サイズ・アポトーシス・組織再生を調節し、腫瘍進展に関わるメカニズムを解明する。Hippo経路の腫瘍抑制機構の詳細な理解を提供する。
papers.novelty_reason: Hippo経路の研究は既知だが、脱ユビキチン化酵素によるYAP/TAZ制御の詳細な機序解析は新しい治療標的を示唆する。

papers.summary: Chromatin organisation influences gene regulation and genome stability, yet its dysregulation in cancer remains incompletely understood. This has become particularly important for patient diagnostics using cell-free DNA (cfDNA) from body fluids, based on computational analyses of nucleosome occupancy landscapes reconstructed from cfDNA. This thesis establishes the first comprehensive atlas of nucleosome positioning signatures across repetitive elements in tumour tissues and cfDNA. Using original approaches to cfDNA analysis, I demonstrate that genomic repetitive elements, including satellite repeats, LINEs, SINEs, and LTRs, undergo reproducible family-, subfamily-, and tissue-specific nucleosome repositioning in cancer. Integration with DNA methylation profiling reveals coordinated changes in methylation and nucleosome positioning at specific genomic repeats, underscoring the epigenetic interplay that drives chromatin instability. Quantifying cfDNA profiles at DNA sequence repeats, inc...
papers.summary_ja: クロマチン構成が遺伝子制御とゲノム安定性に影響し、がんでのその機能不全を解明する。体液中の細胞遊離DNA（cfDNA）からのヌクレオソーム占有度の計算解析に基づいたがん患者診断を実現する。

papers.title: Agta hunter-gatherer oral microbiomes are shaped by contact network structure
papers.title_ja: アグタ狩猟採集民の口腔マイクロバイオームは接触ネットワーク構造によって形作られている
papers.authors: Federico Musciotto, Begoña Dobón, Michael Greenacre, Álex Mira, Nikhil Chaudhary, Guz Deniz Salali, Pascale Gerbault, Rodoplh Schlaepfer, Leonora H. Astete, Marilyn Ngales
papers.summary: Here we investigate the effects of extensive sociality and mobility on the oral microbiome of 138 Agta hunter-gatherers from the Philippines. Our comparisons of microbiome composition showed that the Agta are more similar to Central African Bayaka hunter-gatherers than to neighbouring farmers. We also defined the Agta social microbiome as a set of 137 oral bacteria (only 7% of 1980 amplicon sequence variants) significantly influenced by social contact (quantified through wireless sensors of short-range interactions). We show that large interaction networks including strong links between close kin, spouses, and even unrelated friends, can significantly predict bacterial transmission networks across Agta camps. Finally, we show that more central individuals to social networks are also bacterial supersharers. We conclude that hunter-gatherer social microbiomes are predominantly pathogenic and were shaped by evolutionary tradeoffs between extensive sociality and disease spread.
papers.summary_ja: フィリピンのアグタ狩猟採集民138人の口腔マイクロバイオームを調査し、その社会性と移動性の影響を明らかにする。アグタのマイクロバイオームが中央アフリカのバイアカ狩猟採集民により類似しており、接触ネットワークが構成を決定することを示す。
papers.novelty_reason: 社会的接触ネットワークとマイクロバイオーム構造の関連性を地理的・民族的スケールで解明する新たな視点を提供する。

papers.title: Tumor-derived SERPINB2 and SERPINE1 orchestrate spatially dominant immunosuppressive niches in pancreatic cancer
papers.title_ja: 腫瘍由来SERPINB2およびSERPINE1は膵臓がんにおける空間的に優位な免疫抑制ニッチを組織化する
papers.summary: PDAC forms a dense, T-cell-excluded tumor microenvironment, but the molecular drivers of this niche remain unclear. Using Perturb-map, a spatial functional genomics platform, we identify the fibrinolysis regulators Serpinb2 (PAI-2) and Serpine1 (PAI-1) as key mediators of immune evasion. Tumor-derived SERPINs stabilize a fibrin-rich ECM that anchors macrophages, promotes immunosuppressive polarization, and excludes cytotoxic T cells. Their deletion suppresses tumor growth and sensitizes PDAC to anti-PD-1 therapy.
papers.summary_ja: 膵臓腺がん（PDAC）の密集した免疫排除腫瘍マイクロ環境において、線溶調節因子Serpinb2（PAI-2）およびSerpine1（PAI-1）が免疫逃避の主要なメディエーターであることを空間的機能ゲノミクスプラットフォーム（Perturb-map）で同定した。
papers.novelty_reason: 空間的機能ゲノミクス手法と線溶系タンパク質の免疫抑制機能の組み合わせは、がん免疫微小環境研究における新たなアプローチを提供する。

papers.title: Self-censorship in Saudi cinema: aesthetics and representations
papers.title_ja: サウジアラビア映画における自己検閲：美学と表象
papers.summary: The thesis examines how self-censorship manifests in Saudi cinema and how it defines on-screen representations and aesthetics. Conventional studies on film censorship have typically adopted a binary framework, positioning filmmakers in opposition to institutional censorship. In contrast, this thesis reconfigures the discourse by treating filmmakers as active agents in the censorship process. Framed by the theoretical work of Michel Foucault and Christian Metz, the study moves beyond traditional definitions of censorship to explore how self-censorship operates at multiple levels: internalized, conforming, and resistant. Internalized self-censorship is an unconscious, ingrained power of discipline, manifesting as automatic practices shaped by the filmmaker’s internalization of societal expectations and a result of functioning within a panoptic environment. Conforming self-censorship is a conscious, deliberate response to societal pressures, where the fear of surveillance or public scruti...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、サウジアラビア映画における自己検閲の現れ方と、それがスクリーン上の表象と美学をいかに定義するかを検証している。従来の映画検閲研究が二項対立的枠組みを採用していたのに対し、本研究は製作者と制度的検閲の関係をより複雑に分析する。
papers.novelty_reason: 検閲研究に新しい分析視点をもたらすが、既存の映画研究の枠組み内に留まっている。

papers.summary: Al-Sadu is a traditional weaving technique, which has historically been practised by Bedouin women living in the Arabian Peninsula. Al-Sadu weaving performs a dual role both as a functional craft, which provides nomadic communities with the physical resources that they require to survive in the desert, and an aesthetic means of expressing tribal and communal identities. The researcher is a practitioner of weaving and was a teacher of art in Kuwait. This study explores the utility of and engagement with Al-Sadu in greater depth. The study incorporates a mini-ethnographic research design underwritten by the philosophy of practice-based research. The study aims to identify and describe how children in two differing cultural contexts - the UK and Kuwait - respond to the 'Woven Dialogues' sculpture and express themselves through art and woven materials. 78 children aged between 9 and 11 were recruited from two UK schools and one Kuwaiti school. Data were collected through drawings, weavings...

papers.novelty_reason: 伝統工芸と児童教育の接合点を扱う新しい視点だが、民族誌的研究としては既知の枠組み内。

papers.title: Intimate Ecologies: Queer Speculations on Pleasure, Blackness and Decolonial Aesthetics
papers.title_ja: 親密な生態圏：快感、黒人性、脱植民地的美学についてのクィア的思考
papers.summary: Intimate Ecologies: Queer Speculations on Pleasure, Blackness and Decolonial Aesthetics works to language and make visible the importance and perseverance of sensual erotic relations between Black communities and the more-than-human: earth, fungi, plants, animals, insects, bodies of water, bodies of weather, bodies of gas. Intimate Ecologies works to trace lineages of Indigenous lifeways and ontologies that might be interpreted as queer interspecies relations or entanglements, through visual aesthetics, impossibilities of language and coded oral histories. These histories and visualities surface through Black feminist methodologies of conversation, critical speculative fabulation and decolonial visual analysis, in an attempt to navigate a field made murky by the imposed taboos and violences of colonial occupation and epistemicide. papers.summary: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil (2026) examines the relationship between fashion, photography and the temporal regimes of colonial modernity in the Brazilian Amazon. It explores how land was demarcated with the expansion of the North American frontier in South America, but also how the contours of different ethnic and racialised bodies were delineated and articulated through fashion and via the pseudo-scientific medium of photography.
